what_it_does: Learns compact discrete skin-weight tokens and uses TokenRig to generate skeleton hierarchy plus dense skinning weights from a mesh.
succinct_summary: Very high Morgan relevance: successor to UniRig that unifies skeleton and skin weights for automated avatar rigging.
possible_use: Primary reference for converting Morgan meshes into clean, animatable rigs with skin weights.
important_notes: Prioritize for rig quality; verify model availability, inference scripts, and license before integration.
